other_observers: Cathy Sheeter, who took photographs. Many other people present, including Doug Faulkner and Steve Stachowiak. Not sure who saw which birds that day.;
description: Pale female redpoll, with pallid grayish-buff background color to upperparts, modest to moderate side streaking, large unstreaked white rump patch, and single moderate streak on longest undertail covert feather. Prominent white greater covert wingbar and prominent broad white edges to tertials. Small red cap. Prominent bristles around base of bill with bill appearing smallish.Behaviors: At feedersCall: not heard specificallyPlumage: unknown
